titleStmt.title: SII 25.202: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 202. (A.R. No. 202 of 1908.) KŌVILŪR, PATTUKKOTTAI TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south base of the verandah of the first prākāra in the Mantrapurīśvara temple.
The inscription may be assigned to � century on palaeographical grounds.

It records an order (ōlai) of Paiyyuḻāṉ Periyāṉ-Aḻagiyaperumāḷ alias Śōḻagaṅgaṉ granting the dēvadāṉa lands of 10 mā at Chaṇḍaṉ-karambai, one of the villages declared as paḍaippaṟṟu (village given as military tenure) and the land of araikkāṇi-mundirigai given as house-site for the settlement, as tirumāmattukkāṇi-iṟaiyili for the worship and services (tiruppaṇi) to the deity Tiruvuśāttāṉam-uḍaiya-nāyaṉār. The boundaries of the gift lands and the signatories who attested the document are mentioned.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
§ paiyyuḻāṉ periyāṉaḻakiya perumāḷāṉa coḻakaṅkaṉ Olai . Uṭaiyār tiruvucāttaṉamuṭaiya
nāyaṉār koyil tāṉattār kaṇṭu Innāyaṉāṟkku pūcaikkum tiruppaṇikku muṭalāka tevatāṉamāka ku
ṭutta Iṅkuttaip paṭaippaṟṟāṉa Ūrkaḷil caṇṭaṉ karampaiyil kuṭutta nilattukku kiḻpāṟkellai vi
ra coḻa vaṭavāṟṟukku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai Uṭaiyār tiruvakatticiramuṭaiyār tevatāṉattukku vaṭak
kum melpāṟkellai Ākkaḷa nāṭṭu veḷār Uḷḷiṭṭār tiṟappu nilattukkum Eṉa kuḷattukku kiḻakkum vaṭapārkel
lai vilappaṟṟukku teṟkkum Iṉṉāṉkellaikkuḷḷu naṭuvu paṭṭa perum‘m’ is written below the line.paṭi nilam pattumāvum Iṉṉilattukku ku
ṭi Iruppukku maṉaiyāka viṭṭa Ūri niṉṟum Akarattukku pokiṟa Oḻukkaikku vaṭakkum tiruniṟṟuc coḻaveḷā
ṉ tiruttukkaraiyil puḷikkut teṟkkum Eṉikuḷattukku pokiṟa Oḻukkaikkum paṟṟilipāḻukku meṟ
kum naṭuvupaṭṭa kollai nilam Araikkāṇi muntirikai Innilam Araikkāṇi muntirikaiyum Āka nilam pattumā A
raikkāṇi muntirikai Innilam pattumā Araikkāṇi muntirikaiyum tiripuvaṉac cakkaravattikaḷ śrī Irā
centira coḻatevaṟkku yāṇṭu pattāvatiṉ Etirāmāṇṭu mutal tirunāmattukkāṇiyum Iṟaiyiliyu
māka kaikkoṇṭu pūcaikkum tiruppaṇikkum muṭalāka cantirātittavarai Aṉupavikkavum paṇṇuvate Ippa
ṭi kalveṭṭikkoḷḷak kaṭavatākavum paṇṇuvate Ippaṭikku Ivai coḻakaṅkaṉ Eḻuttu Eṉṟum Ippa
ṭikku Ivai Atikarāyavaḷavataraiyan Eḻutteṉṟum Ippaṭikku Ivai coḻakaṅkaveḷāṉ Eḻut
teṉṟum Ippaṭikku Ivai mutalk kaṇakku vaḷavaṉ muventaveḷāṉ Eḻutteṉṟum Eḻuti Eḻuttiṭṭa Ōlaikkum paṭi .
Digital edition of SII 25.202 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
